body.p1: Tikhiyi to hisa: <1>C</1> Xivono xa Compact/Standard | <1>L</1> Ku voninga/ku tima | <1>S</1> kombisa/fihla swihlawulekisi swa ku lavisisa
body.p2: | <1>Ndhawu</1> Tlanga/Ku yima | <1>+</1> Ku tlakusa vholumo | <1>-</1> Vholumo yi hunguta
body.p3: Nhlayo ya 'Likes' leyi xitichi xi yi kumeke
body.p4: Nhlayo ya ku tlangiwa eka 24h leyi hundzeke
body.p5: Ringeta swileriso eka ndhawu yo lavisisa:
body.p6: Khodi ya tiko yo fana na <1>/de</1> yi xaxameta switichi hinkwaswo swa xijarimani
body.p7: <1>/votes</1> yi teka switichi leswi nga na ti 'Likes' to tala
body.p8: <1>/clicks</1> yi teka switichi swo tala leswi tlangiwaka
body.p9: Loko u pfumala xitichi xa xiya-ni-moya lexi u xi tsakelaka, u nga xi engetela laha eka database:

searchbar.name: Vito
searchbar.placeholder-genre: Ku lavisisa hi muxaka wa vuyimbeleri

menu.export-m3u: Rhumela ehandle Nxaxamelo wa Swichayachayana swa M3U
menu.export-xspf: Rhumela ehandle Nxaxamelo wa Swichayachayana swa XSPF

tooltip.sort-language: Hlela mimbuyelo ya ku lavisisa hi ririmi
tooltip.sort-bitrate: Hlela swihambukelo swa xiya-ni-moya hi bitrate
tooltip.hq: Kombisa ntsena swinambyana swa xiyimo xa le henhla
tooltip.select-country: Switichi ntsena leswi humaka etikweni leri hlawuriweke
tooltip.sort-clicks: Hlela hi ku tlanga ku nga si hela 24h
tooltip.sort-reverse: Ku tlherisela endzhaku ku landzelelana ka ku hlela

dropdown.dialog-footer: Hlanganisa switichi leswi u swi tsakelaka hi ku tirhisa Mii-Link

empty-state.body-favs: Secha swihambukelo leswi u swi tsakelaka ivi u tikhoma

storage.body: Fayili a yi na nchumu kumbe a hi fayili ya RadioMii *.rmf
storage.title: Layicha Swilo Leswi Rhandziwaka

del-favs.body: Xana u lava ku susa switichi hinkwaswo leswi u swi tsakelaka?
del-favs.title: Susa Swilo Leswi Rhandzaka
